description: Per-session replay view. Pick a session via $session_id, then click any prompt row to load its trace into the waterfall panel below. Span search lets you find tool calls or model invocations across the whole session by free-text match.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email']), proj = tostring(Properties['project.name'])
| summarize email=any(email), proj=any(proj)
| extend display = iff(isempty(proj), email, strcat(email, ' • ', proj))
| project display

panels.title: Duration
panels.description: Wall-clock minutes between first and last event in the dashboard window.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| summarize started = min(TimeGenerated), ended = max(TimeGenerated)
| extend duration_min = round(todouble(datetime_diff('second', ended, started)) / 60.0, 1)
| project duration_min

panels.title: Total cost (USD)
panels.description: Sum of cost_usd from api_request events. Excludes cached input.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == 'api_request'
| extend cost = todouble(Properties['cost_usd'])
| summarize total_cost = sum(cost)

AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == 'api_request'
| extend in_tok = toint(Properties['input_tokens']),
         out_tok = toint(Properties['output_tokens'])
| summarize total_tokens = sum(in_tok) + sum(out_tok)

panels.title: 💬 Prompts in this session — click any OperationId cell to switch traces
Prompts (interaction spans)
panels.description: One row per claude_code.interaction span. Click a row's OperationId cell to populate $operation_id and load that prompt's trace below.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppDependencies
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == 'claude_code.interaction'
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| extend full_prompt = tostring(Properties['user_prompt']),
         prompt_len = toint(Properties['user_prompt_length']),
         seq = toint(Properties['interaction.sequence']),
         status_code = tostring(Properties['otel.status_code'])
| extend preview = iff(strlen(full_prompt) > 140,
                       strcat(substring(full_prompt, 0, 140), '…'),
                       full_prompt)
| project ['#'] = seq,
          started = TimeGenerated,
          duration_ms = DurationMs,
          chars = prompt_len,
          status_code,
          OperationId,
          prompt = preview
| order by started asc

panels.title: Trace waterfall
panels.description: Click a row in the prompts table above to populate $operation_id. Then this panel renders the full span tree (claude_code.interaction → llm_request → tool → tool.execution) as a collapsible waterfall.

panels.title: 🔎 Span search across the whole session
Spans (filtered by $search)
panels.description: All spans for the selected session. Type in $search above to filter by span name or any attribute value (case-sensitive substring). Up to 500 rows.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppDependencies
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| extend props_text = tostring(Properties)
| where '${search}' == '' or Name contains_cs '${search}' or props_text contains_cs '${search}'
| extend tool = tostring(Properties['tool_name']),
         model = tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']),
         status_code = tostring(Properties['otel.status_code']),
         full_command = tostring(Properties['full_command'])
| project started = TimeGenerated, span = Name, tool, model, full_command,
          duration_ms = DurationMs, status_code, OperationId, Id, ParentId
| order by started asc
| take 500

panels.title: Tool usage breakdown
panels.description: Aggregated over claude_code.tool.execution spans for this session.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppDependencies
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == 'claude_code.tool.execution'
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| extend tool = tostring(Properties['tool_name'])
| where isnotempty(tool)
| summarize calls = count(),
            total_ms = sum(DurationMs),
            avg_ms = round(avg(DurationMs), 0),
            p95_ms = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 0)
            by tool
| order by total_ms desc

panels.title: Errors & rejected tools
panels.description: Span-level errors (otel.status_code=ERROR) and tool decisions where the user rejected the tool call.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
union
  (AppDependencies
   | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
   | where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
   | where tostring(Properties['otel.status_code']) == 'ERROR'
   | extend entry_kind = 'span_error', detail = Name),
  (AppTraces
   | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
   | where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
   | where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == 'tool_decision'
       and tostring(Properties['decision_type']) == 'reject'
   | extend entry_kind = 'tool_rejected', detail = tostring(Properties['tool_name']))
| project started = TimeGenerated, entry_kind, detail
| order by started asc

list.name: law_resource
list.label: Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID
list.description: Paste the full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

list.name: ai_resource
list.label: Application Insights Resource ID
list.description: Paste the full resource ID of the Application Insights component (used by the Azure Traces query).

list.name: session_id
list.label: Session
list.description: Recent sessions (last 7 days) ordered by start time. Label format: <email> · <date> · <prompt_count>p. Only sessions that have at least one claude_code.interaction span (i.e., emitted with beta tracing on) appear here.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where Name == 'claude_code.interaction'
| extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email']),
         sess = tostring(Properties['session.id'])
| where isnotempty(sess)
| summarize first_seen = min(TimeGenerated), prompts = count() by sess, email
| order by first_seen desc
| take 100
| project __value = sess,
          __text = strcat(email, ' · ',
                          format_datetime(first_seen, 'yy-MM-dd HH:mm'),
                          ' · ', prompts, 'p')

list.name: operation_id
list.label: Operation ID
list.description: Auto-populated from interactions in the selected session, newest first. Default selection is the most recent prompt's trace; click any other prompt row to switch.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where Name == 'claude_code.interaction'
| where tostring(Properties['session.id']) == '${session_id}'
| extend seq = toint(Properties['interaction.sequence']),
         preview = substring(tostring(Properties['user_prompt']), 0, 60)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
| project __value = OperationId,
          __text = strcat('#', seq, ' · ', preview)

list.name: search
list.label: Span search
list.description: Case-sensitive substring match across span name and all properties. Empty = show all spans.

title: Agent Observability — Session Trace

__inputs.name: DS_AZURE_MONITOR
__inputs.label: Azure Monitor
__inputs.description: Azure Monitor data source with access to Log Analytics + Application Insights.
